name: MSSP - SW - CAN - 01 - M - Multiple Instances are Detected from Different Source IPs within a Short Time period
notes: A rule to monitor when a new interface is powered up or when power is granted to an interface. This can help detect unauthorized or unplanned network changes, which could be critical in environments where network access control is strict.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Cisco Aironet
when the event QID is one of the following (47500074) Interface power granted, (47500073) Interface Power detected
when at least 7 events are seen with the same Log Source Type and different Interface_CAN (custom) in 30 minutes
thresholds: when at least 7 events are seen with the same Log Source Type and different Interface_CAN (custom) in 30 minutes
TD_list: APPLY MSSP - SW - CAN - 01 - M - Multiple Instances are Detected from Different Source IPs within a Short Time period on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Cisco Aironet
AND when the event QID is one of the following (47500074) Interface power granted, (47500073) Interface Power detected
AND when at least 7 events are seen with the same Log Source Type and different Interface_CAN (custom) in 30 minutes
RED_list: Event name: MSSP - SW - CAN - 01 - M - Multiple Instances are Detected from Different Source IPs within a Short Time period
Event description: MSSP - SW - CAN - 01 - M - Multiple Instances are Detected from Different Source IPs within a Short Time period
